name: CombatMeter
description: Real-time party DPS/HPS meter with role colours.
author: Stellar

added: Chunked raw-event upload: full runs keep their combat events (ring raised 8k -> 128k, uploaded in ~4k-event chunks after the summary) — scoped per-skill breakdowns now work across the whole run, not just the tail.
Run links and uploads now use the new stellarresonance.app domain (logs.stellarresonance.app / api.stellarresonance.app).
fixed: Replay capture resets on every scene change (stale walk-in tracks from a previous scene no longer pollute the next run's replay).
